org.arakhne.neteditor.swing.dnd

Class FigureTransferHandler

  • java.lang.Object
    • javax.swing.TransferHandler
      • org.arakhne.neteditor.swing.dnd.FigureTransferHandler
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    Serializable, UIResource

    public class FigureTransferHandler
extends TransferHandler
implements UIResource
    Implementation of a transfer handler dedicated to the figures.
    Version:
    17.0 2013-10-23 21:03:09
    Author:
    Stéphane GALLAND
    See Also:
    Serialized Form
